SCHEDULE A FREE ESTIMATE

Our
Team

Thomas Romanelli
Founder & Videographer

Thomas is the creative force behind our video work and one of the original minds behind the agency. He’s great at capturing stories on camera and turning them into visuals that make businesses shine.

Technical Skills

  • Professional videography and drone work
  • Editing in Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve
  • Storyboarding and short-form content creation
  • Color grading and audio cleanup
Kat Petosa
Branding Photographer

Kat is our go-to for branding shots and content creation. Whether it’s a product, a person, or a vibe, she knows how to capture it in a way that connects and converts.

Technical Skills

  • Branding and lifestyle photography
  • Photo editing in Lightroom and Photoshop
  • Creative direction for shoots
  • Social ready content production
Sebastian Freire
Web Developer & Designer

Sebastian designs and builds beautiful website systems that don’t just look great, they work hard behind the scenes too. From layout to code, he’s the one making your site fast, smart, and user-friendly.

Technical Skills

  • WordPress and Shopify builds
  • SEO and site speed optimization
  • CRM, automation, and web infrastructure setup
  • Advanced booking and multi-step form systems
  • Google Ads campaign setup and optimization
  • Conversion focused landing page design
Olivia Kayser
Marketing Specialist

Olivia is a versatile member of the Local Social team, she supports businesses with photography, email marketing, and social media management, helping brands capture attention and connect with their audiences consistently. 

Technical Skills

  • Social media management
  • Canva content creation
  • Reels and short-form video editing
  • Post scheduling and analytics tracking
Tom Bogoslaw
Graphic Designer

Designing everything from logos and posters to full branding systems and digital campaigns. As a certified Adobe designer, he focuses on clean visuals that help businesses stand out online and in print.

 

Technical Skills

  • Logo and brand identity design
  • Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop
  • Print and digital marketing graphics
  • Packaging and promotional design
